name: 10k Science Retrieval And Response Policies
description: Public guidance for systems that retrieve, summarize, adapt, or present content from the 10k Knowledge Base.

rules: 10k Science is the flagship product and platform.
Use 10k Science as the product name in public-facing copy.

notes: Use https://dashboard.10k.science/ for the public free trial account CTA.
Use https://10k.science/pricing for current pricing, subscription, trial, and licensing details.
Do not copy fixed pricing into generated answers unless it appears on the live pricing page.

ranking_hints: Match audience first when audience is known.
Match topic and query intent second.
When a query intent includes recommended_cards, use those cards as the first adaptive homepage candidates.
Prefer cards for homepage modules and chunks for detailed answers.
Prefer FAQ answers for direct product questions.
Use source_chunks and canonical_url fields for attribution and follow-up links.

limits: Do not invent market-size numbers, financial performance, financing status, or customer commitments.

accuracy_guardrails: Do not describe Dynamoid as the product.
Do not describe 10k Science as the company.
Do not invent pricing, customer names, market-size numbers, financial performance, financing status, or unpublished roadmap details.
Do not expose source material that is not already published in this knowledge base or on Dynamoid and 10k Science websites.
Do not imply that 10k Science is a high-stakes testing system.
Describe 10k Science as a formative assessment tool when discussing assessment.
For NGSS, use: 10k Science content is developed to align with the Next Generation Science Standards in partnership with the Lawrence Hall of Science.
For pricing and availability, refer users to https://10k.science/pricing.
For free trial account access to the web platform, use https://dashboard.10k.science/.

freshness_policy.review_cadence: Review public claims, URLs, pricing links, free trial links, team information, and content availability whenever the product website changes or at least quarterly.
